card.name: The Dawning Archaic
card.property: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard. Reach Whenever The Dawning Archaic attacks, you may cast target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Rancorous Archaic
card.property: Trample, reach Converge — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it.

card.name: Sundering Archaic
card.property: Converge — When this creature enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls with mana value less than or equal to the number of colors of mana spent to cast this creature. {2}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Together as One
card.property: Converge — Target player draws X cards, Together as One deals X damage to any target, and you gain X life, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell.

card.name: Transcendent Archaic
card.property: Vigilance Converge — When this creature enters, you may draw X cards, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell. If you draw one or more cards this way, discard two cards.

card.name: Ajani's Response
card.property: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a tapped creature. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Antiquities on the Loose
card.property: Create two 2/2 red and white Spirit creature tokens. Then if this spell was cast from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on each Spirit you control. Flashback {4}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Ascendant Dustspeaker
card.property: Flying When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control. At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile up to one target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Daydream
card.property: Exile target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it. Flashback {2}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Dig Site Inventory
card.property: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains vigilance until end of turn. Flashback {W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Eager Glyphmage
card.property: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white and black Inkling creature token with flying.

card.name: Emeritus of Truce // Swords to Plowshares
Ennis, Debate Moderator
card.property: When Ennis enters, exile up to one other target creature you control. Return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step. At the beginning of your end step, if one or more cards were put into exile this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Ennis.

card.name: Erode
card.property: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Graduation Day
card.property: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Group Project
card.property: Create a 2/2 red and white Spirit creature token. Flashback—Tap three untapped creatures you control. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Harsh Annotation
card.property: Destroy target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 white and black Inkling creature token with flying.

card.name: Informed Inkwright
card.property: Vigilance Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, create a 1/1 white and black Inkling creature token with flying.

card.name: Inkshape Demonstrator
card.property: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, this creature gets +1/+0 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Interjection
card.property: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Owlin Historian
card.property: Flying When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Practiced Offense
card.property: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature target player controls. Target creature gains your choice of double strike or lifelink until end of turn. Flashback {1}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Primary Research
card.property: When this enchantment enters, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. At the beginning of your end step, if a card left your graveyard this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Rapier Wit
card.property: Tap target creature. If it's your turn, put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Draw a card.

card.name: Rehearsed Debater
card.property: Vigilance Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Restoration Seminar
card.property: Return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Shattered Acolyte
card.property: Lifelink {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Soaring Stoneglider
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile two cards from your graveyard or pay {1}{W}. Flying, vigilance

card.name: Stand Up for Yourself
card.property: Destroy target creature with power 3 or greater.

card.name: Stirring Hopesinger
card.property: Flying, lifelink Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Stone Docent
card.property: {W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: You gain 2 life. Surveil 1. Activate only as a sorcery. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Summoned Dromedary
card.property: Vigilance {1}{W}: Return this card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Banishing Betrayal
card.property: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Brush Off
card.property: This spell costs {1}{U} less to cast if it targets an instant or sorcery spell. Counter target spell.

card.name: Chase Inspiration
card.property: Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)

card.name: Deluge Virtuoso
card.property: When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, this creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Divergent Equation
card.property: Return up to X target instant and/or sorcery cards from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Divergent Equation.

card.name: Echocasting Symposium
card.property: Target player creates a token that's a copy of target creature you control. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Essence Scatter
card.property: Counter target creature spell.

card.name: Exhibition Tidecaller
card.property: Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target player mills three cards. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, that player mills ten cards instead.

card.name: Flow State
card.property: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. If there is an instant card and a sorcery card in your graveyard, instead put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Fractal Anomaly
card.property: Create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token and put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of cards you've drawn this turn.

card.name: Fractalize
card.property: Until end of turn, target creature becomes a green and blue Fractal with base power and toughness each equal to X plus 1. (It loses all other colors and creature types.)

card.name: Homesickness
card.property: Target player draws two cards. Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on each of them. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Hydro-Channeler
card.property: {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.

card.name: Jadzi, Steward of Fate // Oracle's Gift
Mana Sculpt
card.property: Counter target spell. If you control a Wizard, add an amount of {C} equal to the amount of mana spent to cast that spell at the beginning of your next main phase.

card.name: Mathemagics
card.property: Target player draws 2ˣ cards. (2º = 1, 2¹ = 2, 2² = 4, 2³ = 8, 2⁴ = 16, 2⁵ = 32, and so on.)

card.name: Matterbending Mage
card.property: When this creature enters, return up to one other target creature to its owner's hand. Whenever you cast a spell with {X} in its mana cost, this creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Muse Seeker
card.property: Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, draw a card. Then discard a card unless five or more mana was spent to cast that spell.

card.name: Muse's Encouragement
card.property: Create a 3/3 blue and red Elemental creature token with flying. Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Orysa, Tide Choreographer
card.property: This spell costs {3} less to cast if creatures you control have total toughness 10 or greater. When Orysa enters, draw two cards.

card.name: Pensive Professor
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, draw a card.

card.name: Procrastinate
card.property: Tap target creature. Put twice X stun counters on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Quick Study
card.property: Draw two cards.

card.name: Run Behind
card.property: This spell costs {1} less to cast if it targets an attacking creature. Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Tester of the Tangential
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may pay {X}. When you do, move X +1/+1 counters from this creature onto another target creature.

card.name: Textbook Tabulator
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Wisdom of Ages
card.property: Return all instant and sorcery cards from your graveyard to your hand. You have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game. Exile Wisdom of Ages.

card.name: Arcane Omens
card.property: Converge — Target player discards X cards, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell.

card.name: Arnyn, Deathbloom Botanist
card.property: Deathtouch Whenever a creature you control with power or toughness 1 or less dies, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Burrog Banemaker
card.property: Deathtouch {1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Cost of Brilliance
card.property: Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life. Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

card.name: Decorum Dissertation
card.property: Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Dissection Practice
card.property: Target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Up to one target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Up to one target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: End of the Hunt
card.property: Target opponent exiles a creature or planeswalker they control with the highest mana value among creatures and planeswalkers they control.

card.name: Eternal Student
card.property: {1} {B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 white and black Inkling creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Foolish Fate
card.property: Destroy target creature. Infusion — If you gained life this turn, that creature's controller loses 3 life.

card.name: Forum Necroscribe
card.property: Ward—Discard a card. Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Last Gasp
card.property: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Lecturing Scornmage
card.property: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Masterful Flourish
card.property: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)

card.name: Melancholic Poet
card.property: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Moseo, Vein's New Dean
card.property: Flying When Moseo enters, create a 1/1 black and green Pest creature token with "Whenever this token attacks, you gain 1 life." Infusion — At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, return up to one target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, where X is the amount of life you gained this turn.

card.name: Poisoner's Apprentice
card.property: Infusion — When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -4/-4 until end of turn if you gained life this turn.

card.name: Postmortem Professor
card.property: This creature can't block. Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {1}{B}, Exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Pox Plague
card.property: Each player loses half their life, then discards half the cards in their hand, then sacrifices half the permanents they control of their choice. Round down each time.

card.name: Pull from the Grave
card.property: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Rabid Attack
card.property: Until end of turn, any number of target creatures you control each get +1/+0 and gain "When this creature dies, draw a card."

card.name: Ral Zarek, Guest Lecturer
card.property: +1: Surveil 2. −1: Any number of target players each discard a card. −2: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. −7: Flip five coins. Target opponent skips their next X turns, where X is the number of coins that came up heads.

card.name: Send in the Pest
card.property: Each opponent discards a card. You create a 1/1 black and green Pest creature token with "Whenever this token attacks, you gain 1 life."

card.name: Sneering Shadewriter
card.property: Flying When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Tragedy Feaster
card.property: Trample Ward—Discard a card. Infusion — At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice a permanent unless you gained life this turn.

card.name: Ulna Alley Shopkeep
card.property: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Infusion — This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you gained life this turn.

card.name: Wander Off
card.property: Exile target creature.

card.name: Withering Curse
card.property: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. Infusion — If you gained life this turn, destroy all creatures instead.

card.name: Ancestral Anger
card.property: Target creature gains trample and gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is 1 plus the number of cards named Ancestral Anger in your graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Archaic's Agony
card.property: Converge — Archaic's Agony deals X damage to target creature, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell. Exile cards from the top of your library equal to the excess damage dealt to that creature this way. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Artistic Process
card.property: Choose one — • Artistic Process deals 6 damage to target creature. • Artistic Process deals 2 damage to each creature you don't control. • Create a 3/3 blue and red Elemental creature token with flying. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Charging Strifeknight
card.property: Haste {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Choreographed Sparks
card.property: This spell can't be copied. Choose one or both — • Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. • Copy target creature spell you control. The copy gains haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token."

card.name: Duel Tactics
card.property: Duel Tactics deals 1 damage to target creature. It can't block this turn. Flashback {1}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Expressive Firedancer
card.property: Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, this creature also gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Flashback
card.property: Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. (You may cast that card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Garrison Excavator
card.property: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, create a 2/2 red and white Spirit creature token.

card.name: Heated Argument
card.property: Heated Argument deals 6 damage to target creature. You may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, Heated Argument also deals 2 damage to that creature's controller.

card.name: Impractical Joke
card.property: Damage can't be prevented this turn. Impractical Joke deals 3 damage to up to one target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Improvisation Capstone
card.property: Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile cards with total mana value 4 or greater. You may cast any number of spells from among them without paying their mana costs. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Living History
card.property: When this enchantment enters, create a 2/2 red and white Spirit creature token. Whenever you attack, if a card left your graveyard this turn, target attacking creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Magmablood Archaic
card.property: Trample, reach Converge — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn for each color of mana spent to cast that spell.

card.name: Mica, Reader of Ruins
card.property: Ward—Pay 3 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.) Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Molten-Core Maestro
card.property: Menace Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, add an amount of {R} equal to this creature's power.

card.name: Rearing Embermare
card.property: Reach, haste

card.name: Rubble Rouser
card.property: When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Add {R}. When you do, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Seize the Spoils
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Steal the Show
card.property: Choose one or both — • Target player discards any number of cards, then draws that many cards. • Steal the Show deals damage equal to the number of instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Tablet of Discovery
card.property: When this artifact enters, mill a card. You may play that card this turn. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.) {T}: Add {R}. {T}: Add {R}{R}. Spend this mana only to cast instant and sorcery spells.

card.name: Tackle Artist
card.property: Trample Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature instead.

card.name: Thunderdrum Soloist
card.property: Reach Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, this creature deals 3 damage to each opponent instead.

card.name: Tome Blast
card.property: Tome Blast deals 2 damage to any target. Flashback {4}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Unsubtle Mockery
card.property: Unsubtle Mockery deals 4 damage to target creature. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Zealous Lorecaster
card.property: When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Aberrant Manawurm
card.property: Trample Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the amount of mana spent to cast that spell.

card.name: Additive Evolution
card.property: When this enchantment enters, create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token. Put three +1/+1 counters on it. At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Ambitious Augmenter
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) When this creature dies, if it had one or more counters on it, create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token, then put this creature's counters on that token.

card.name: Burrog Barrage
card.property: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn if you've cast another instant or sorcery spell this turn. Then it deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Chelonian Tackle
card.property: Target creature you control gets +0/+10 until end of turn. Then it fights up to one target creature an opponent controls. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Comforting Counsel
card.property: Whenever you gain life, put a growth counter on this enchantment. As long as there are five or more growth counters on this enchantment, creatures you control get +3/+3.

card.name: Efflorescence
card.property: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. Infusion — If you gained life this turn, that creature also gains trample and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Emil, Vastlands Roamer
card.property: Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have trample. {4}{G}, {T}: Create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Environmental Scientist
card.property: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Follow the Lumarets
card.property: Infusion — Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. If you gained life this turn, you may instead reveal two creature and/or land cards from among them and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Germination Practicum
card.property: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Glorious Decay
card.property: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Glorious Decay deals 4 damage to target creature with flying. • Exile target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Hungry Graffalon
card.property: Reach Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)

card.name: Lumaret's Favor
card.property: Infusion — When you cast this spell, copy it if you gained life this turn. You may choose new targets for the copy. Target creature gets +2/+4 until end of turn.

card.name: Mindful Biomancer
card.property: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life. {2}{G}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Noxious Newt
card.property: Deathtouch {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Oracle's Restoration
card.property: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. You draw a card and gain 1 life.

card.name: Pestbrood Sloth
card.property: Reach When this creature dies, create two 1/1 black and green Pest creature tokens with "Whenever this token attacks, you gain 1 life."

card.name: Planar Engineering
card.property: Sacrifice two lands. Search your library for four basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Shopkeeper's Bane
card.property: Trample Whenever this creature attacks, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Slumbering Trudge
card.property: This creature enters with a number of stun counters on it equal to three minus X. If X is 2 or less, it enters tapped.

card.name: Snarl Song
card.property: Converge — Create two 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature tokens. Put X +1/+1 counters on each of them and you gain X life, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell.

card.name: Tenured Concocter
card.property: Vigilance Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, you may draw a card. Infusion — This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you gained life this turn.

card.name: Thornfist Striker
card.property: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Infusion — Creatures you control get +1/+0 and have trample as long as you gained life this turn.

card.name: Topiary Lecturer
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) {T}: Add an amount of {G} equal to this creature's power.

card.name: Wild Hypothesis
card.property: Create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it. Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Wildgrowth Archaic
card.property: Trample, reach Converge — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it. Whenever you cast a creature spell, that creature enters with X additional +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast it.

card.name: Zimone's Experiment
card.property: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal up to two creature and/or land cards from among them, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Put all land cards revealed this way onto the battlefield tapped and put all creature cards revealed this way into your hand.

card.name: Abstract Paintmage
card.property: At the beginning of your first main phase, add {U}{R}. Spend this mana only to cast instant and sorcery spells.

card.name: Applied Geometry
card.property: Create a token that's a copy of target non-Aura permanent you control, except it's a 0/0 Fractal creature in addition to its other types. Put six +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Ark of Hunger
card.property: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, this artifact deals 1 damage to each opponent and you gain 1 life. {T}: Mill a card. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Aziza, Mage Tower Captain
card.property: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may tap three untapped creatures you control. If you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Berta, Wise Extrapolator
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on Berta, add one mana of any color. {X}, {T}: Create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token and put X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Blech, Loafing Pest
card.property: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on each Pest, Bat, Insect, Snake, and Spider you control.

card.name: Bogwater Lumaret
card.property: Whenever this creature or another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Borrowed Knowledge
card.property: Choose one — • Discard your hand, then draw cards equal to the number of cards in target opponent's hand. • Discard your hand, then draw cards equal to the number of cards discarded this way.

card.name: Cauldron of Essence
card.property: Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {1}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Colorstorm Stallion
card.property: Ward {1}, haste Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, create a token that's a copy of this creature.

card.name: Colossus of the Blood Age
card.property: When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to each opponent and you gain 3 life. When this creature dies, discard any number of cards, then draw that many cards plus one.

card.name: Conciliator's Duelist
card.property: When this creature enters, draw a card. Each player loses 1 life. Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, exile up to one target creature. Return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Cuboid Colony
card.property: Flash Flying, trample Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)

card.name: Dina's Guidance
card.property: Search your library for a creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand or graveyard, then shuffle.

card.name: Elemental Mascot
card.property: Flying, vigilance Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Embrace the Paradox
card.property: Draw three cards. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Essenceknit Scholar
card.property: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black and green Pest creature token with "Whenever this token attacks, you gain 1 life." At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died under your control this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Fix What's Broken
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Return each artifact and creature card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Fractal Mascot
card.property: Trample When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. Put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Fractal Tender
Geometer's Arthropod
card.property: Whenever you cast a spell with {X} in its mana cost, look at the top X cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Grapple with Death
card.property: Destroy target artifact or creature. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Growth Curve
card.property: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control, then double the number of +1/+1 counters on that creature.

card.name: Hardened Academic
card.property: Flying, haste Discard a card: This creature gains lifelink until end of turn. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Imperious Inkmage
card.property: Vigilance When this creature enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Inkling Mascot
card.property: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, this creature gains flying until end of turn. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Killian's Confidence
card.property: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Draw a card. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you may pay {W/B}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Kirol, History Buff // Pack a Punch
Lorehold Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Each opponent sacrifices a nontoken artifact of their choice. • Return target artifact or creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Lorehold, the Historian
card.property: Flying, haste Each instant and sorcery card in your hand has miracle {2}. (You may cast a card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.) At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Mind into Matter
card.property: Draw X cards. Then you may put a permanent card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Mind Roots
card.property: Target player discards two cards. Put up to one land card discarded this way onto the battlefield tapped under your control.

card.name: Molten Note
card.property: Molten Note deals damage to target creature equal to the amount of mana spent to cast this spell. Untap all creatures you control. Flashback {6}{R}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Moment of Reckoning
card.property: Choose up to four. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Destroy target nonland permanent. • Return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Nita, Forum Conciliator
card.property: Whenever you cast a spell you don't own, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. {2}, Sacrifice another creature: Exile target instant or sorcery card from an opponent's graveyard. You may cast it this turn, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell. If that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Old-Growth Educator
card.property: Vigilance, reach Infusion — When this creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on it if you gained life this turn.

card.name: Paradox Surveyor
card.property: Reach When this creature enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a land card or a card with {X} in its mana cost from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Pest Mascot
card.property: Trample Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Practiced Scrollsmith
card.property: First strike When this creature enters, exile target noncreature, nonland card from your graveyard. Until the end of your next turn, you may cast that card.

card.name: Prismari Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Surveil 2, then draw a card. • Prismari Charm deals 1 damage to each of one or two targets. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Prismari, the Inspiration
card.property: Flying Ward—Pay 5 life. Instant and sorcery spells you cast have storm. (Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Proctor's Gaze
card.property: Return up to one target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Professor Dellian Fel
card.property: +2: You gain 3 life. 0: You draw a card and lose 1 life. −3: Destroy target creature. −6: You get an emblem with "Whenever you gain life, target opponent loses that much life."

card.name: Pterafractyl
card.property: Flying This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature enters, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Pursue the Past
card.property: You gain 2 life. You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. Flashback {2}{R}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Quandrix Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. • Destroy target enchantment. • Target creature has base power and toughness 5/5 until end of turn.

card.name: Quandrix, the Proof
card.property: Flying, trample Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.) Instant and sorcery spells you cast from your hand have cascade.

card.name: Rapturous Moment
card.property: Draw three cards, then discard two cards. Add {U}{U}{R}{R}{R}.

card.name: Render Speechless
card.property: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature.

card.name: Resonating Lute
card.property: Lands you control have "{T}: Add two mana of any one color. Spend this mana only to cast instant and sorcery spells." {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if you have seven or more cards in your hand.

card.name: Root Manipulation
card.property: Until end of turn, creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain menace and "Whenever this creature attacks, you gain 1 life." (A creature with menace can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

card.name: Scolding Administrator
card.property: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When this creature dies, if it had counters on it, put those counters on up to one target creature.

card.name: Silverquill Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. • Exile target creature with power 2 or less. • Each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Silverquill, the Disputant
card.property: Flying, vigilance Each instant and sorcery spell you cast has casualty 1. (As you cast that spell, you may sacrifice a creature with power 1 or greater. When you do, copy the spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.)

card.name: Snooping Page
card.property: Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, this creature can't be blocked this turn. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Social Snub
card.property: When you cast this spell while you control a creature, you may copy this spell. Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice. Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Spectacular Skywhale
card.property: Flying Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, put three +1/+1 counters on this creature instead.

card.name: Spirit Mascot
card.property: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Splatter Technique
card.property: Choose one — • Draw four cards. • Splatter Technique deals 4 damage to each creature and planeswalker.

card.name: Stadium Tidalmage
card.property: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: Startled Relic Sloth
card.property: Trample, lifelink At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile up to one target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Stirring Honormancer
card.property: When this creature enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of creatures you control. Put one of those cards into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Stress Dream
card.property: Stress Dream deals 5 damage to up to one target creature. Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of those cards into your hand and the other on the bottom of your library.

card.name: Suspend Aggression
card.property: Exile target nonland permanent and the top card of your library. For each of those cards, its owner may play it until the end of their next turn.

card.name: Teacher's Pest
card.property: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever this creature attacks, you gain 1 life. {B}{G}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Traumatic Critique
card.property: Traumatic Critique deals X damage to any target. Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Vibrant Outburst
card.property: Vibrant Outburst deals 3 damage to any target. Tap up to one target creature.

card.name: Vicious Rivalry
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Destroy all artifacts and creatures with mana value X or less.

card.name: Visionary's Dance
card.property: Create two 3/3 blue and red Elemental creature tokens with flying. {2}, Discard this card: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Wilt in the Heat
card.property: This spell costs {2} less to cast if one or more cards left your graveyard this turn. Wilt in the Heat deals 5 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Witherbloom Charm
card.property: Choose one — • You may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, draw two cards. • You gain 5 life. • Destroy target nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Witherbloom, the Balancer
card.property: Affinity for creatures (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control.) Flying, deathtouch Instant and sorcery spells you cast have affinity for creatures.

card.name: Zaffai and the Tempests
card.property: Once during each of your turns, you may cast an instant or sorcery spell from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Biblioplex Tomekeeper
card.property: When this creature enters, choose up to one — • Target creature becomes prepared. (Only creatures with prepare spells can become prepared.) • Target creature becomes unprepared.

card.name: Diary of Dreams
card.property: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a page counter on this artifact. {5}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each page counter on this artifact.

card.name: Mage Tower Referee
card.property: Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Page, Loose Leaf
card.property: {T}: Add {C}. Grandeur — Discard another card named Page, Loose Leaf: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Potioner's Trove
card.property: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}: You gain 2 life. Activate only if you've cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn.

card.name: Strixhaven Skycoach
card.property: Flying When this Vehicle enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Deathcap Glade
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Dreamroot Cascade
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Fields of Strife
card.property: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {2}{R}{W}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Forum of Amity
card.property: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {2}{W}{B}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Great Hall of the Biblioplex
card.property: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell. {5}: If this land isn't a creature, it becomes a 2/4 Wizard creature with "Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn." It's still a land.

card.name: Paradox Gardens
card.property: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {2}{G}{U}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Petrified Hamlet
card.property: When this land enters, choose a land card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated unless they're mana abilities. Lands with the chosen name have "{T}: Add {C}." {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Shattered Sanctum
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Skycoach Waypoint
card.property: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}: Target creature becomes prepared. (Only creatures with prepare spells can become prepared.)

card.name: Spectacle Summit

card.name: Ral Zarek, Guest Lecturer
card.property: +1: Surveil 2. −1: Any number of target players each discard a card. −2: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. −7: Flip five coins. Target opponent skips their next X turns, where X is the number of coins that came up heads.

card.name: Professor Dellian Fel
card.property: +2: You gain 3 life. 0: You draw a card and lose 1 life. −3: Destroy target creature. −6: You get an emblem with "Whenever you gain life, target opponent loses that much life."

card.property: Flying, haste Each instant and sorcery card in your hand has miracle {2}. (You may cast a card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.) At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Prismari, the Inspiration
card.property: Flying Ward—Pay 5 life. Instant and sorcery spells you cast have storm. (Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Quandrix, the Proof
card.property: Flying, trample Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.) Instant and sorcery spells you cast from your hand have cascade.

card.name: Silverquill, the Disputant
card.property: Flying, vigilance Each instant and sorcery spell you cast has casualty 1. (As you cast that spell, you may sacrifice a creature with power 1 or greater. When you do, copy the spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.)

card.name: Witherbloom, the Balancer
card.property: Affinity for creatures (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control.) Flying, deathtouch Instant and sorcery spells you cast have affinity for creatures.

card.name: The Dawning Archaic
card.property: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard. Reach Whenever The Dawning Archaic attacks, you may cast target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.

card.name: Restoration Seminar
card.property: Return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Echocasting Symposium
card.property: Target player creates a token that's a copy of target creature you control. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Decorum Dissertation
card.property: Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Tragedy Feaster
card.property: Trample Ward—Discard a card. Infusion — At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice a permanent unless you gained life this turn.

card.name: Improvisation Capstone
card.property: Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile cards with total mana value 4 or greater. You may cast any number of spells from among them without paying their mana costs. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Magmablood Archaic
card.property: Trample, reach Converge — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn for each color of mana spent to cast that spell.

card.name: Germination Practicum
card.property: Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Paradigm (Then exile this spell. After you first resolve a spell with this name, you may cast a copy of it from exile without paying its mana cost at the beginning of each of your first main phases.)

card.name: Wildgrowth Archaic
card.property: Trample, reach Converge — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it. Whenever you cast a creature spell, that creature enters with X additional +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast it.

card.name: Blech, Loafing Pest
card.property: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on each Pest, Bat, Insect, Snake, and Spider you control.

card.name: Colorstorm Stallion
card.property: Ward {1}, haste Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, create a token that's a copy of this creature.

card.name: Geometer's Arthropod
card.property: Whenever you cast a spell with {X} in its mana cost, look at the top X cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Deathcap Glade
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Dreamroot Cascade
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Shattered Sanctum
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Stormcarved Coast
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Sundown Pass
card.property: This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Together as One
card.property: Converge — Target player draws X cards, Together as One deals X damage to any target, and you gain X life, where X is the number of colors of mana spent to cast this spell.

card.name: Antiquities on the Loose
card.property: Create two 2/2 red and white Spirit creature tokens. Then if this spell was cast from anywhere other than your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on each Spirit you control. Flashback {4}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Emeritus of Truce // Swords to Plowshares
Erode
card.property: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Informed Inkwright
card.property: Vigilance Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, create a 1/1 white and black Inkling creature token with flying.

card.name: Practiced Offense
card.property: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature target player controls. Target creature gains your choice of double strike or lifelink until end of turn. Flashback {1}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Stirring Hopesinger
card.property: Flying, lifelink Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Exhibition Tidecaller
card.property: Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target player mills three cards. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, that player mills ten cards instead.

card.name: Jadzi, Steward of Fate // Oracle's Gift
Mana Sculpt
card.property: Counter target spell. If you control a Wizard, add an amount of {C} equal to the amount of mana spent to cast that spell at the beginning of your next main phase.

card.name: Mathemagics
card.property: Target player draws 2ˣ cards. (2º = 1, 2¹ = 2, 2² = 4, 2³ = 8, 2⁴ = 16, 2⁵ = 32, and so on.)

card.name: Pensive Professor
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on this creature, draw a card.

card.name: Wisdom of Ages
card.property: Return all instant and sorcery cards from your graveyard to your hand. You have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game. Exile Wisdom of Ages.

card.name: Moseo, Vein's New Dean
card.property: Flying When Moseo enters, create a 1/1 black and green Pest creature token with "Whenever this token attacks, you gain 1 life." Infusion — At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, return up to one target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, where X is the amount of life you gained this turn.

card.name: Postmortem Professor
card.property: This creature can't block. Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {1}{B}, Exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Pox Plague
card.property: Each player loses half their life, then discards half the cards in their hand, then sacrifices half the permanents they control of their choice. Round down each time.

card.name: Withering Curse
card.property: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. Infusion — If you gained life this turn, destroy all creatures instead.

card.name: Choreographed Sparks
card.property: This spell can't be copied. Choose one or both — • Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. • Copy target creature spell you control. The copy gains haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token."

card.name: Flashback
card.property: Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. (You may cast that card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Molten-Core Maestro
card.property: Menace Opus — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If five or more mana was spent to cast that spell, add an amount of {R} equal to this creature's power.

card.name: Steal the Show
card.property: Choose one or both — • Target player discards any number of cards, then draws that many cards. • Steal the Show deals damage equal to the number of instant and sorcery cards in your graveyard to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Ambitious Augmenter
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) When this creature dies, if it had one or more counters on it, create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token, then put this creature's counters on that token.

card.name: Comforting Counsel
card.property: Whenever you gain life, put a growth counter on this enchantment. As long as there are five or more growth counters on this enchantment, creatures you control get +3/+3.

card.name: Planar Engineering
card.property: Sacrifice two lands. Search your library for four basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Slumbering Trudge
card.property: This creature enters with a number of stun counters on it equal to three minus X. If X is 2 or less, it enters tapped.

card.name: Applied Geometry
card.property: Create a token that's a copy of target non-Aura permanent you control, except it's a 0/0 Fractal creature in addition to its other types. Put six +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Ark of Hunger
card.property: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, this artifact deals 1 damage to each opponent and you gain 1 life. {T}: Mill a card. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Aziza, Mage Tower Captain
card.property: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, you may tap three untapped creatures you control. If you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Berta, Wise Extrapolator
card.property: Increment (Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana you spent is greater than this creature's power or toughness, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on Berta, add one mana of any color. {X}, {T}: Create a 0/0 green and blue Fractal creature token and put X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Cauldron of Essence
card.property: Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {1}{B}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Conciliator's Duelist
card.property: When this creature enters, draw a card. Each player loses 1 life. Repartee — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets a creature, exile up to one target creature. Return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Dina's Guidance
card.property: Search your library for a creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand or graveyard, then shuffle.

card.name: Fix What's Broken
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Return each artifact and creature card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Hardened Academic
card.property: Flying, haste Discard a card: This creature gains lifelink until end of turn. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Mind into Matter
card.property: Draw X cards. Then you may put a permanent card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Moment of Reckoning
card.property: Choose up to four. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Destroy target nonland permanent. • Return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Nita, Forum Conciliator
card.property: Whenever you cast a spell you don't own, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. {2}, Sacrifice another creature: Exile target instant or sorcery card from an opponent's graveyard. You may cast it this turn, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell. If that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Resonating Lute
card.property: Lands you control have "{T}: Add two mana of any one color. Spend this mana only to cast instant and sorcery spells." {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if you have seven or more cards in your hand.

card.name: Splatter Technique
card.property: Choose one — • Draw four cards. • Splatter Technique deals 4 damage to each creature and planeswalker.

card.name: Suspend Aggression
card.property: Exile target nonland permanent and the top card of your library. For each of those cards, its owner may play it until the end of their next turn.

card.name: Traumatic Critique
card.property: Traumatic Critique deals X damage to any target. Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Vicious Rivalry
card.property: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Destroy all artifacts and creatures with mana value X or less.

card.name: Zaffai and the Tempests
card.property: Once during each of your turns, you may cast an instant or sorcery spell from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Great Hall of the Biblioplex
card.property: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell. {5}: If this land isn't a creature, it becomes a 2/4 Wizard creature with "Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn." It's still a land.

card.name: Petrified Hamlet
card.property: When this land enters, choose a land card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated unless they're mana abilities. Lands with the chosen name have "{T}: Add {C}." {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Lorehold Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Each opponent sacrifices a nontoken artifact of their choice. • Return target artifact or creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Prismari Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Surveil 2, then draw a card. • Prismari Charm deals 1 damage to each of one or two targets. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Quandrix Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. • Destroy target enchantment. • Target creature has base power and toughness 5/5 until end of turn.

card.name: Silverquill Charm
card.property: Choose one — • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. • Exile target creature with power 2 or less. • Each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Witherbloom Charm
card.property: Choose one — • You may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, draw two cards. • You gain 5 life. • Destroy target nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Wisdom of Ages
card.property: Return all instant and sorcery cards from your graveyard to your hand. You have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game. Exile Wisdom of Ages.
